# CWE-842: Placement of User into Incorrect Group (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-842-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type Member struct {
	Email string `json:"email"`
	Group string `json:"group"`
}

var members []Member

// Safe: new accounts receive the standard members group by default.
func RegisterMember(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	email := r.FormValue("email")
	member := Member{Email: email, Group: "members"}
	members = append(members, member)
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(member)
}
